test.details: 110 tests across 13 test files (4 in utils, 8 in ai, 1 in web) — all passing

typecheck.details: TypeScript passes across all 3 packages (utils, ai, web)

lint.details: Biome check passes across all 3 packages — 94 files checked, no issues

appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/architecture.md: fixed outdated 'maxSteps >= 2' to 'stopWhen: stepCountIs(N)' to reflect AI SDK v6 breaking change. Added shadcn data-slot targeting pattern documentation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add accessibility convention: all custom interactive elements (links, buttons outside shadcn) should use the focus-visible ring pattern: focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-background. This ensures consistent keyboard navigation accessibility.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature misc-foundation-polish added this pattern to landing page CTA links (apps/web/src/app/page.tsx). The pattern isn't documented as a project-wide convention yet.

rejectedObservations.observation: shadcn data-slot convention should be added to AGENTS.md
rejectedObservations.reason: Applied as library factual knowledge instead — it's a codebase discovery, not a normative rule. Added to .factory/library/architecture.md under Vercel AI SDK section.
